security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8000 http://localhost:8000; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:;

bundle.longDescription: SyncHire packages resume, job description, application tracking, search, and data portability workflows into a local-first desktop app.
